hero.label: AI · ANALYTICS · AUTOMATION
hero.title: The automation gap is costing you more than you think.
hero.subtitle: Your team is spending hours on work that should run itself. We build the AI infrastructure to fix that — delivered in days, not months.
hero.trustLine: Fixed-price projects. No agency overhead. You own the code.

services.label: — WHAT WE DO
services.title: Three practice areas. One outcome: growth.
services.subtitle: We don't sell software. We build the infrastructure that makes your business run without you.
services.s1desc: Stop guessing. Turn your raw data into real-time dashboards that surface the decisions you actually need to make.
services.s2desc: Every hour your team spends on repetitive work is an hour not spent on growth. We automate the former so you can focus on the latter.
services.s3desc: Deploy AI assistants, extractors, and generators trained on your business context — not generic prompts.

howItWorks.label: — HOW WE WORK
howItWorks.title: Brief on Monday. Staging link on Tuesday. Yours on Friday.
howItWorks.subtitle: No discovery sprints. No lengthy proposals. We scope, build, and ship.
howItWorks.s1desc: Tell us what you need. We turn it into a clear, fixed-price proposal within 24 hours.
howItWorks.s2desc: We build in the open. You get a staging link on day one and can provide feedback throughout.
howItWorks.s3desc: We hand over everything: source code, documentation, and full IP. No lock-in, no dependencies.

pricing.label: — ENGAGEMENT MODELS
pricing.title: Choose how we work together.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

starter.name: Project
starter.desc: A single, fixed-scope delivery for teams that know what they need.

growth.name: Retainer
growth.desc: An ongoing partnership for teams moving fast and shipping constantly.

platform.name: Platform
platform.desc: Self-serve access to our entire library of templates, tools, and automations.

q1.q: How fast is the typical delivery?
q1.a: Most project-tier deliveries are completed within 3–5 business days. Retainer clients get priority: new requests are scoped and started within 24 hours of submission.

q2.q: What tech stack do you use?
q2.a: We work with modern, open-source tools: Next.js, Supabase, n8n for automations, and Anthropic Claude for AI features. We adapt to your existing stack — we don't impose ours.

q3.q: Do I own the code and data?
q3.a: Always. Every deliverable includes full source code and documentation. Your data stays in your infrastructure — we never store client data on our systems.

q4.a: Yes. No lock-in. Cancel with 30 days notice. We earn your business every month through speed and quality — not contracts.

q5.q: What if the deliverable doesn't meet my expectations?
q5.a: We iterate until it does. Our process includes a review phase before final handover. If something isn't right, we fix it at no additional cost. We don't consider a project done until you're satisfied.

q6.a: Yes. We sign NDAs before any sensitive information is shared. All client data and business context is treated as confidential. We never reference client projects in our own materials without explicit permission.

cta.title: Ready to stop doing manually what AI can do in hours?
cta.subtitle: Start with a single project. No commitment, no discovery sprints, no sales pitch.

footer.description: AI infrastructure and automation for startups and growing businesses.

about.label: — ABOUT
about.title: Built for teams that can't wait for a 3-month agency project.
about.subtitle: Pragmas started from a simple observation: most growing businesses are sitting on data they can't read, running processes they can't automate, and paying agencies that move too slow. We fix that — with infrastructure that ships in days and code you own forever.
about.v1body: Every project has a clear scope, a clear price, and a clear deadline. We don't do retainers with hourly overruns.
about.v2body: Every line of code, every workflow, every dashboard we build is yours. No lock-in. No dependency on us to keep your systems running.
about.v3body: We deliver staging links on day one. Most projects ship in 3–5 days. We believe fast iteration beats long planning sprints.
about.stackTitle: Modern tools. Open source where it counts.
about.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you need. We'll scope it in 24 hours.

analyticsService.label: — SERVICE
analyticsService.title: Analytics & Intelligence
analyticsService.subtitle: Stop pulling reports manually. We build real-time dashboards that answer your questions before you ask them.
analyticsService.includedTitle: Everything you need to see your data clearly.
analyticsService.p1desc: We identify your data sources: databases, CRMs, spreadsheets, APIs. We build the pipelines.
analyticsService.p2desc: We define your KPIs, clean the data, and structure it for fast querying.
analyticsService.p3desc: We build the dashboard — responsive, real-time, and tailored to how your team thinks.
analyticsService.p4desc: Full source code, documentation, and a walkthrough. The dashboard is yours to run.
analyticsService.uc1desc: Real-time sales dashboards pulling from Shopify, Stripe, and your warehouse. Know your numbers before your standup.
analyticsService.uc2desc: Activation rates, churn signals, feature adoption. The metrics your product team actually needs — in one place.
analyticsService.uc3desc: Consolidate data from your ops tools into a single view. Delivery performance, capacity, cost per unit — all live.
analyticsService.ctaTitle: Ready to see your data clearly?
analyticsService.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you need to measure. We'll scope a dashboard and deliver it in days.

automationService.label: — SERVICE
automationService.title: Automation & Workflows
automationService.subtitle: Every hour your team spends on repetitive work is an hour not spent on growth. We eliminate the former.
automationService.includedTitle: Built to run without you watching.
automationService.p1desc: We document your current manual processes and identify what's worth automating first.
automationService.p2desc: We design the workflow logic: triggers, conditions, actions, and error paths.
automationService.p3desc: We build and test the workflow in n8n. Staging environment before touching production.
automationService.p4desc: We set up error alerts and hand over a runbook. You're in control from day one.
automationService.uc1desc: Automatically score, enrich, and route leads from your website to the right rep in your CRM — in under 30 seconds.
automationService.uc2desc: Extract line items from PDF invoices, match to purchase orders, and update your accounting system. Zero manual entry.
automationService.uc3desc: Keep your CRM, project tracker, and billing platform in sync. No more copy-paste between tools.
automationService.uc4desc: Trigger personalized email sequences, Slack messages, and task creation the moment a new customer signs.
automationService.ctaTitle: Which process should you automate first?
automationService.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what your team does manually. We'll tell you whether it's worth automating — and what it would cost.

aiService.label: — SERVICE
aiService.title: AI-Powered Products
aiService.subtitle: Deploy assistants, extractors, and generators trained on your business context — not generic prompts.
aiService.i5: API integration into your existing apps
aiService.p1desc: We map the domain — your data, terminology, edge cases, and what good output looks like.
aiService.p2desc: We engineer and test prompts systematically. We evaluate for accuracy, tone, and failure modes.
aiService.p3desc: We build the API layer connecting Claude to your data sources, internal tools, and UI.
aiService.p4desc: We ship to production and monitor performance. Full source code and documentation included.
aiService.useCasesTitle: Applied AI that solves specific problems.
aiService.uc1desc: An AI that answers support questions using your documentation, ticket history, and product context — without hallucinating.
aiService.uc2desc: Extract structured data from contracts, invoices, or reports. Convert PDFs into clean JSON your systems can use.
aiService.uc3desc: Drafts in your brand voice. Product descriptions, email sequences, internal documentation — at scale.
aiService.uc4desc: An AI interface over your internal docs, SOPs, and wikis. Your team asks questions; it finds the answers.
aiService.ctaTitle: What would your AI tool do?
aiService.ctaSubtitle: Describe the problem you want AI to solve. We'll tell you if it's buildable and what it would cost.

careers.label: — CAREERS
careers.title: Work with us.
careers.subtitle: Pragmas is a small, focused team. We stay lean on purpose — it keeps us fast, direct, and accountable to our clients. When we bring people in, it's because the work demands it and the fit is right.
careers.w1body: We work asynchronously across time zones. There are no mandatory standups. Communication is written, documented, and deliberate. You manage your own time.
careers.w2body: We do not hire full-time staff for most engagements. Work is structured around specific client projects with clear scopes and defined deliverables — not open-ended roles.
careers.w3body: We value people who can move across the stack. Deep expertise in one area matters, but the ability to pick up adjacent tools and think end-to-end is what makes collaboration here work.
careers.openBody: We don't post roles until there's a real project to staff. When something comes up that fits your background, we'd rather reach out to someone we already know than start from scratch. If you want to be on our radar, send us a short note.
careers.freelanceBody1: Most of our project capacity comes from a roster of specialist freelancers we trust and have worked with before. When client demand grows or a project calls for a skill set outside our core team, we bring in the right person for that engagement.
careers.freelanceBody2: If you are a strong practitioner in AI engineering, data infrastructure, backend development, or automation — and you want to collaborate on focused, well-scoped work — we want to hear from you. Tell us what you do, what you've built, and how you prefer to work.

blog.title: Practical guides on AI, automation, and data infrastructure.
blog.subtitle: We write about what we build. Real implementations, real problems, real solutions.
blog.subscribeTitle: Subscribe to be notified when we publish.
blog.subscribeSubtitle: No spam. Only articles worth reading.
blog.subscribeSuccess: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
blog.a1title: How we build a custom analytics dashboard in 4 days
blog.a1desc: A step-by-step breakdown of our process: from connecting the data sources to delivering a production-ready dashboard with real-time KPIs.
blog.a2title: The 5 workflows every ops team should automate in 2026
blog.a2desc: Lead routing, invoice processing, onboarding sequences — the specific automations that consistently deliver the highest ROI for growing teams.
blog.a3title: Why we charge fixed prices for AI projects (and why it works)
blog.a3desc: Hourly billing creates misaligned incentives. Fixed pricing forces us to scope well, move fast, and deliver — without the ambiguity.
